payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and visible vertical wood grain; matte finish with minor surface wear and small scuffs, no visible handle; mostly centered in the crop but slightly edge-cropped at the top-right, occupying most of the frame which suggests the camera was about 0.6 m away.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark brown wooden cabinet door","long_description":"Dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and visible vertical wood grain; matte finish with minor surface wear and small scuffs, no visible handle; mostly centered in the crop but slightly edge-cropped at the top-right, occupying most of the frame which suggests the camera was about 0.6 m away.","attributes":["dark brown","wood grain texture","recessed rectangular panel","matte finish","minor scuffs/wear","no visible hardware","edge-cropped top-right","vertical orientation","single door"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.6}
